name: Reclaim the Surface
oracle_text:
Destroy target artifact and target enchantment.
Create two 4/4 green Dinosaur creature tokens with trample.
flavor_text: Nature does not reclaim. It was never gone.

validation_errors: Common has 2 keyword abilities; NWO suggests at most 1

art_prompt: Two massive dinosaurs with muted earthy hides—dusty brown and slate grey—crash through crumbling stone ruins overgrown with vines. Ancient artifacts and enchanted relics shatter beneath their feet as vegetation reclaims the fractured landscape. Raw primal power dominates the frame.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: Green uncommon sorcery at CMC 7. Moved from common to uncommon where the dual-target requirement (artifact AND enchantment) is acceptable as a narrower payoff for greedier limited decks. In uncommon, this serves as a splashy endgame card that rewards players who include both artifact and enchantment removal targets in their deck, and the 8 power of tokens plus dual removal is appropriately efficient for the slot. Fits the theme of nature overtaking ancient ruins.
